summary: Iteration 44 - Full Data Import Testing. Verified all imported data: 326 members (98 PIF, 228 Recurring), 38 categories (25 revenue, 13 expense), 26 membership types with correct is_pif config, ~3400 transactions, 32 KPI months. New Budget Mensuel page tested - grid displays correctly, tabs work, inline editing works. Dashboard defaults to latest month with data (mars 2026).

GET /api/members.details: 326 members returned - 98 Membres PIF, 228 Membres Généraux Récurrents

GET /api/categories.details: 38 categories - 25 revenue, 13 expense, all with kpi_column

GET /api/settings/membership-types.details: 26 types - PIF types have is_pif=True (6 WEEKS CHALLENGE, ANNUEL X1, PACK, etc.)

PUT /api/transactions/update-monthly-amo.details: Successfully updates monthly amount and recalculates KPIs

GET /api/monthly-kpis/2025-01.details: KPI data available with revenue and expenses

dashboard.details: Dashboard defaults to mars 2026 (latest with data), shows revenue=300 CHF, members=108, charts display correctly

budget_mensuel_page.details: Page loads at /budget, shows 13 expense categories with monthly data, tabs work (Dépenses/Revenus), year navigation works (2024-2026)

inline_editing.details: Clicking on cell activates input field, editing mode works

seed_data_creation: No test data created - testing existing imported data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full data import verified: 326 members (98 PIF, 228 Recurring), 38 categories (25 revenue + 13 expense), 26 membership types, ~3400 transactions, 32 KPI months. Budget Mensuel page at /budget working correctly with grid display, tabs, year navigation, and inline editing. Dashboard defaults to mars 2026. Member types use 'Membres Généraux Récurrents' (not just 'Membres Récurrents'). KPIs have data from 2024-01 to 2026-03, with actual transactions mostly from 2025 onwards.
